target: Implement tmux-native operator UX with compact status/header surfaces, degraded indicators, helper affordances, and useful dead-pane failure cards.
invariants: The UI must remain a derived supervisory surface, not a second source of truth.
Desktop and mobile must consume the same shared state model.
Neon accents are structural; state color and explicit text remain primary.

steps.task: Implement the tmux-native header/statusline content model so profile state, active role, and degraded indicators are compact and explicit.
requirements: Do not overload the statusline with decorative clutter.
Use explicit textual state in addition to color.

steps.task: Implement dead-pane failure card rendering and tmux helper affordances for focus, respawn, reset-layout, and status/help overlay content.
requirements: A failed pane must not remain silent blank space.
Failure cards must show failed surface, next action, and exact command.

steps.task: Add integration checks for tmux-native metadata and failure-card behavior.
requirements: Keep tests focused on tmux UX behavior rather than dashboard screens.
